# For more information: https://laravel.com/docs/sail services: laravel.test: build: context: ./vendor/laravel/sail/runtimes/{{PHP_VERSION}} dockerfile: Dockerfile args: WWWGROUP: '${WWWGROUP}' image: sail-{{PHP_VERSION}}/app extra_hosts: - 'host.docker.internal:host-gateway' ports: - '${APP_PORT:-80}:80' - '${VITE_PORT:-5173}:${VITE_PORT:-5173}' environment: WWWUSER: '${WWWUSER}' LARAVEL_SAIL: 1 XDEBUG_MODE: '${SAIL_XDEBUG_MODE:-off}' XDEBUG_CONFIG: '${SAIL_XDEBUG_CONFIG:-client_host=host.docker.internal}' IGNITION_LOCAL_SITES_PATH: '${PWD}' volumes: - '.:/var/www/html' networks: - sail networks: sail: driver: bridge
